title: 制定适当的策略与方案 / Strategies & Solutions
summary: 方案须针对已识别需求,适合风险承受与负担;先保障应急后积累;推荐有与分析挂钩的合理基础。 / Solutions must address identified needs, suit risk appetite and affordability, prioritise protection/emergency before accumulation, and have a reasonable basis tied to the analysis.

sections.heading: 适当性
sections.body: 方案匹配需求、风险承受、负担能力与时间;不可一刀切或推销高佣不适合产品。

sections.heading: Suitability
sections.body: Match needs, risk appetite, affordability and horizon; no one-size-fits-all or high-commission misfit.

sections.heading: 优先级与依据
sections.body: 通常先解决保障与应急,再追求积累;推荐基于事实收集与分析,能解释"为何适合"。

sections.heading: Priority & basis
sections.body: Address protection/emergency first, then accumulation; base advice on the fact-find/analysis and explain why it fits.

keyPoints: 方案匹配需求/风险/负担 / Match needs/risk/affordability
先保障应急后积累 / Protection/emergency before accumulation
推荐有合理基础 / Reasonable basis
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Developing Appropriate Strategies and Solutions
